message:
🐛 Fix demo mode login bypass

In demo mode (Netlify previews), bypass GitHub OAuth entirely
since window.location navigation can't be intercepted by MSW.
Sets mock user credentials directly when VITE_DEMO_MODE=true.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
